---
name: Good first issue
about: A task suitable for someone new to the codebase
labels: good first issue, help wanted
---

**What needs to be done**
A clear, small, self-contained task.

**Where to look**
Point to the relevant file(s), function(s), and line numbers.

**Expected outcome**
What a successful PR will produce (test output, new function signature, updated docs, etc.)

**Hints / resources**
Anything that will help a first-time contributor succeed quickly.
